creator: gasol.wu@gmail.com
text:
Recently announcement says as following, but I think create gearmand-devel will be okay, I'll send pr later.


0.39 is the stable release, 1.1.1 is the new ABI abstraction release.


The first development release of the 1.2 tree is ready. There are zero changes in the interface between the 1.0 and 1.2 trees.



--  
Gasol Wu
Sent with Sparrow (http://www.sparrowmailapp.com/?sig)


On 2012å¹´9æ29æ¥Saturday at ä¸å1:41, Greg Larkin wrote:

>  
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
>  
> The current devel/gearmand port tracks the 0.xx upstream branch, and
> version 0.39 was recently released. I prefer to upgrade the existing
> port to 0.39 to avoid incompatibility breakage with current consumers.
>  
> Would you generate a shar file with version 1.1.1 of the port and attach
> it to this PR? I will then create devel/gearmand-devel to track that
> branch.
>  
> Thank you,
> Greg
>  
> - --
